case_title: FINNY EARL WALLACE VS. SARIAH STURDIVANT

docket_entries.description: REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WALLACE, FINNY EARL
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF WALLACE, FINNY EARL
TRIAL RESET TO FEB-14-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-10-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-14-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-20-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF MAR. 20, 2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT, PARTIES WERE PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT TAKES THIS MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. NO EXHIBIT RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00 <WAIVER>);REMARKS: THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE DEFENDANT WAS NOT FOUND. FILED BY PLAINTIFF WALLACE, FINNY EARL AS TO DEFENDANT STURDIVANT, SARIAH
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (IFP: $0.00_ FILED BY PLAINTIFF WALLACE, FINNY EARL AS TO DEFENDANT STURDIVANT, SARIAH
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-20-2019 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY WALLACE, FINNY EARL AS TO DEFENDANT STURDIVANT, SARIAH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-10-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WALLACE, FINNY EARL AS TO DEFENDANT STURDIVANT, SARIAH

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WALLACE, FINNY EARL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT STURDIVANT, SARIAH STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
